title: codereview-P1: missing ccp13_vectors definition in generate.py
description: test/vectors/generate.py:1940 references ccp13.json but no ccp13_vectors() function or _write call; test_vectors.py:78 lists ccp13.json in schema test but file missing. Discovered during review of da2q.13.4 edit (chunk 1). Tagged codereview.
